name: Baked Tuna Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Enriched Corn Meal (Aunt Jemima or Quaker)
1 can Tuna (6-1/2 or 7-oz. size), drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, corn meal, and salt (if using). Cut in shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add water, about one tablespoon at a time, stirring lightly with a fork until the mixture forms a ball.
4. On a lightly floured surface, roll out the pastry to form a 12-inch circle. Fit it loosely into a 9-inch glass pie plate and trim the edges.
5. Turn the edges under and flute them. Place the broccoli between layers of paper towels to absorb excess water, then pat gently.
6. In a bowl, mix the broccoli, remaining salt, tuna, parmesan cheese, and dillweed.
7. Pour the mixture into the pastry shell.
8. Bake for 50-55 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
9. Serve with lemon wedges if desired.
